source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/3. 보완(제출)★/★보완제출문서/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/01 사용목적에 관한 자료 (Rev)/[별첨 2.] 사용자 설명서(GT series).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for H&abyz GT1717C/GT1717CP digital flat panel X-ray detector models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides intended use, safe operation, installation, maintenance, EMC guidance, regulatory compliance, labeling, warranty, and revision history for the GT1717C/GT1717CP detector.
keyPoints: The detector converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography equipment and stores and transmits images.
The detector is contraindicated for mammography.
Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.
Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: This user manual explains how to use the GT1717C/GT1717CP detector models made by H&abyz.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.evidence: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is a device that converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography (DR) equipment and stores and transmits the images.

concepts.name: Contraindication for mammography
concepts.evidence: This detector cannot be used for mammography.

concepts.name: EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: This equipment complies with the IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.

concepts.name: WEEE disposal
concepts.evidence: This product is not to be disposed with your household waste, according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

concepts.name: Product lifetime
concepts.evidence: Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

concepts.name: Periodic inspection and maintenance
concepts.evidence: perform a periodic inspection at least once a year.

evidence.claim: The document is a user manual for GT1717C/GT1717CP detector models made by H&abyz.
evidence.evidenceText: This user manual explains how to use the GT1717C/GT1717CP detector models made by H&abyz.

evidence.claim: The document revision is A-IFU-CYN(Rev.1).
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz Co., Ltd. A-IFU-CYN(Rev.1) Page 2 of 44

evidence.claim: Revision version 1 is dated 2026.03.19 and was revised due to overall content update.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 2026.03.19 Revised due to overall content update

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP converts medical images into digital format using DR equipment and stores and transmits images.
evidence.evidenceText: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is a device that converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography (DR) equipment and stores and transmits the images.

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP is used to examine patients with, or suspected of having, musculoskeletal injuries and respiratory diseases.
evidence.evidenceText: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is used to examine patients with, or suspected of having, musculoskeletal injuries and respiratory diseases.

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP cannot be used for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: This detector cannot be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
evidence.evidenceText: Only a physician or a legally certified operator should use this product.

evidence.claim: GT1717C has standard 300 micrometer CsI deposition thickness and GT1717CP has premium 500 micrometer CsI deposition thickness.
evidence.evidenceText: CsI Deposition Thickness Standard (300μm) Premium (500μm)

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP uses PIN-TFT sensor type.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type PIN-TFT (a-Si, TFT)

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP has dimensions of 460 x 476 x 15.8 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Dimensions (H x W x D) 460 x 476 x 15.8 mm

evidence.claim: GT1717C weighs 3.95 kg and GT1717CP weighs 4.2 kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Weight 3.95kg (GT1717C) / 4.2kg (GT1717CP)

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP has an effective array of 3072 x 3072 pixels and pixel pitch of 140 micrometers.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Array 3072 x 3072 pixels... Pixel pitch 140μm

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP supports AED and Line Trigger modes.
evidence.evidenceText: The interface utilizing GT1717C / GT1717CP wired detectors and an X-ray generator includes AED and Line Trigger modes.

evidence.claim: GT1717C/GT1717CP complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment complies with the IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.

evidence.claim: RF emissions are CISPR 11 Group 1 and Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Emissions CISPR 11 Group 1... RF Emissions CISPR 11 Class A

evidence.claim: The detector is suitable for use in establishments other than domestic, with a healthcare-professional-use warning for domestic/public low-voltage networks.
evidence.evidenceText: This Detector is suitable for use in all establishments other than domestic... Warning: This equipment/system is intended for use by healthcare professionals only.

evidence.claim: Disposal in the European Union and EEA must follow WEEE Directive 2012/19/EC and national law.
evidence.evidenceText: European Union (and EEA*) only... according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

evidence.claim: Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: Periodic inspection should be performed at least once a year.
evidence.evidenceText: perform a periodic inspection at least once a year.

evidence.claim: The product is manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd... Country of Origin Made in Korea

reviewFlags.reason: MFDS/domestic appears only as source metadata authoritySignal and is not stated in the source text; authorityOrJurisdiction is limited to jurisdictions explicitly stated in the manual.
The document has multiple date-bearing entries in revision history; documentDate uses the Rev.1 date because the visible header states A-IFU-CYN(Rev.1).
Some page text has OCR or source quality issues, including stray text at the beginning and spelling variants such as Dimention, Metho, and Mislight.
